scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @roommates/server" "npm run dev -w @roommates/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @roommates/shared && npm run build -w @roommates/server && npm run build -w @roommates/web
scripts.build:sites: npm run build -w @roommates/shared && npm run build -w @roommates/web && npm run build:worker -w @roommates/server && node scripts/assemble-sites.mjs
scripts.prepare:sites: npm run build:sites && npm run package:sites
scripts.check:sites: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run prepare:sites
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
